events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On The Floor', celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Playlist
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo! What's your ultimate Jennifer Lopez track to get the party started?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' famously being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: Remembering MTV's Debut
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed the game, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe's Impact
angles.copy: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' dropped back in '94 and instantly became a Britpop cornerstone. What track from that album still gets you every time?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969, drawing hundreds of thousands to a dairy farm in upstate New York.

angles.name: Spirit of Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago, Woodstock brought together half a million people for three days of peace, love, and music. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years ago, the music world fell silent as we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His legacy, however, lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur being shot
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, iconic rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by in Las Vegas, tragically passing away six days later on September 13.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today, 30 years after the tragic shooting that led to his passing. His music and message continue to resonate. What's your top Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix tragically passed away on September 18, 1970, leaving behind an unparalleled musical legacy.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a true guitar hero, Jimi Hendrix. His influence is still felt across music today. Which Hendrix riff is your absolute favourite?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released on September 26, 1969, a masterpiece that delivered timeless tracks and an unforgettable album cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Memories
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', an album that defined a generation. What's your favourite moment from this legendary record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, known for her distinctive voice and rock 'n' roll attitude.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Rock Legacy
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your go-to Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and iconic former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday, LG!
angles.copy: You know the voice, you know the attitude! Happy 54th birthday to Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune featuring the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single on October 11, 1971, becoming a global anthem for peace and hope.

angles.name: Imagine The World
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music and carry our entire libraries in our pockets.

angles.name: The Original iPod
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple dropped the original iPod, changing music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours back in the day?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to legendary theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. The Beatles legend was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring genius of John Lennon. What's the John Lennon song that resonates most with you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968, showcasing the band's diverse musical directions.

angles.name: The White Album's Sound
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album' – a sprawling, eclectic masterpiece. What's your favourite hidden gem from this iconic record?
